rules: return_to must point to a /m path
return_to on a decision result page is downstream return context; it must not trigger an automatic redirect away from the result page by itself
utility pages must preserve source, scenario_id, result_cta, and return_to across in-utility hops
if a utility surface cannot honor return_to, it must degrade to /m/choose
category must be one of the shared decision catalog keys
scenario_id is required on result-to-utility hops
result_cta is required when a utility page is opened from the result page
result_cta vocabulary is bag_add, compare, rationale, retry_same_category, or switch_category
compare_id is optional compare-result provenance and must be preserved across compare-origin utility hops
closure is only valid for compare-result -> /m/me/use completion handoff
decision is only valid when closure=keep_current and must be keep or hybrid
product_source is only valid on compare-result -> /m/me/use completion handoff and may be upload_new or history_product
product_brand and product_name are display hints for /m/me/use completion copy and must not drive routing
closure, decision, product_source, product_brand, and product_name must not be forwarded beyond the /m/me/use completion landing
resume_token is only valid for questionnaire resume flows
